violations.description: Ensure the contrast between foreground and background colors meets WCAG 2 AA minimum contrast ratio thresholds
violations.help: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds

relatedNodes.html: <header class="site-header has-inline-mobile-toggle" id="masthead" aria-label="Site" itemtype="https://schema.org/WPHeader" itemscope="">

any.message: Element has insufficient color contrast of 3.73 (foreground color: #d2d1d1, background color: #696664, font size: 8.2pt (10.88px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1

nodes.failureSummary:
